data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
\mathbf{G}_{k,l,n} = \sum_{i,j,m} \mathbf{K}_{i,j,m,n} \cdot \mathbf{F}_{k+i-1,l+j-1,m}
```

This will render the equation correctly in a LaTeX document.

The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
D_K \cdot D_K \cdot \alpha M \cdot D_F \cdot D_F + \alpha M \cdot \alpha N \cdot D_F \cdot D_F
```

This will render the equation as shown in the image.
